title.en: Qingshan Domain Ancestor shuttled in front of Y...

content.en:
"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, I am the Qingshan Domain Ancestor of the Dao Yuan Holy Land, and I want to buy a Holy Tablet quota, I don't know if it's okay?"

Qingshan Domain Ancestor shuttled in front of Ye Tian and asked.

"As long as you can afford the price, I can naturally sell you a spot!"

Ye Tiandao.

Immediately, he made his bid.

Unlike the light-clothed saintess, the light-clothed saintess only paid a little price and obtained a holy tablet place, but that was because Ye Tian needed a jade bottle at that time, so he agreed to the transaction with the light-clothed saintess.

But now it's different, even if he is given a jade pure bottle, don't want to get a holy monument place.

And the Qingshan Domain Ancestor was not a person from the Battle Gate, so Ye Tian's offer was very high.

Six holy relics alone are needed, and many resources and treasures are needed.

After hearing this, the Qingshan Domain Ancestor was immediately stunned, and couldn't help but say: "Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, your price is too high, even if I sell the treasures of the whole body, I can't buy a place!"

"If you can't afford it, let's go!"

Ye Tian waved his hand.

"You ......"

Qingshan Domain Ancestor was very annoyed.

It's a pity that he is not Ye Tian's opponent, he is just a first-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor, and he is not even an ant in front of Ye Tian.

Immediately, the Qingshan Domain Ancestor left.

I have to say that almost none of the Supreme Domain Ancestors here could afford to buy a place, and they returned disappointed one by one.

......

Ten days later, the other Holy Sects of the Dark Sacred Domain sent many domain ancestors to arrive at the Daoshan Realm, and they all used the secret treasure and rushed at a very fast speed, lest they delay the time, once the quota was gone, they would have no way to compete for this quota at all.

Rumble!!!!!

A Domain Ancestor descended to the Xuanxu Holy Realm and appeared near the Holy Monument.

The first to arrive were the Domain Ancestors of the Firmament Holy Gate, and the leaders were the three Invincible Domain Ancestors.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, our Firmament Holy Gate needs some Holy Monument places, how about it?"

One of the Invincible Domain Ancestors said with a smile.

These words were obviously threatening, threatening Ye Tian with the combat power of the invincible domain ancestor.

Although Ye Tian's strength is very strong, the ordinary Invincible Domain Ancestor is far from being Ye Tian's opponent, but the Invincible Domain Ancestor who speaks is not an ordinary Invincible Domain Ancestor.

At this time, this invincible domain ancestor leaked a wisp of breath slightly, as if suppressing the eons, far surpassing the ordinary invincible domain ancestor.

"Two-step invincible domain ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered in his heart.

Such an invincible domain ancestor, he is far from being an opponent.

"Mo Evil Domain Ancestor, are you threatening our battle gate?"

The Ancient Sea Ancestor and the others appeared, confronting the three Invincible Domain Ancestors of the Firmament Holy Gate.

"Eight War Emperors, the Battle Gate is really generous!"

The Mo Evil Domain Ancestor of the Firmament Holy Gate said solemnly.

This time, they only sent three two-step invincible domain ancestors, but they didn't expect the battle gate to be even bigger, sending eight.

However, it is also true, although the Holy Monument does not belong to the Battle Gate, it belongs to Ye Tian, and Ye Tian is the domain ancestor of the Battle Gate, and the War Gate naturally has a lot of Holy Monument places, so naturally he will not pay attention to it.

"Ancient Sea Ancestor, this holy monument has 1,000 places, our Firmament Holy Gate doesn't have many, how about 30 places?"

Mo Evil Domain Ancestor proposed.

"30 places?

Ye Tian scolded directly.

"You ......"

The Mo Evil Domain Ancestor was furious and wanted to kill Ye Tian.

A mere supreme domain ancestor dared to be so disrespectful to him!

"The opinion of the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor is our opinion!" the Ancient Sea Domain Ancestor and the others immediately said.

At this moment, another group of domain ancestors arrived.

They are the domain ancestors of the Holy Gate of All Things, and the Holy Gate of All Things has sent four invincible domain ancestors, and they are all invincible domain ancestors who are more than two steps.

With the passage of time, one by one, the domain ancestors of the Holy Gate came, and even many holy places sent three-step invincible domain ancestors.

A large number of invincible domain ancestors have descended with their juniors, putting pressure on the human race and the battle gate.

At this time, the Battle Gate is also ready to open the Battle Boundary Tower at any time, so that many War Emperors of the War Gate will come.

Of course, this is a situation that cannot be helped, and it is these Holy Gates who will make a choice when they all attack them.

"Ancient Sea Ancestor, since we are here, it is impossible for us to return empty-handed, let's give up some places!"

The Bloodstained Domain Ancestor from the Dark Holy Gate spoke.

Ye Tian spoke: "Invincible Domain Ancestors, it's okay to want a quota, but you have to buy it, if you want to get a quota for free, it's impossible." Even some of the strongest domain ancestors of the Battle Gate, if they want to get some places, they must buy them!"

"Buying a place, ridiculous!"

Many Invincible Domain Ancestors were very dissatisfied.

If they wanted to buy a place, wouldn't it be a waste of time for these Invincible Domain Ancestors to come over?

Their goal is to get some places for free, and that's what they're asking for.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, let me deal with it!"

One of the eight invincible domain ancestors of the Battle Gate, the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors spoke.

"Then I'm tired of the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors!"

Ye Tian knew very well that his weight was too low, these Invincible Domain Ancestors simply ignored him, and he couldn't do it if he wanted to threaten these Invincible Domain Ancestors.

In a word, it's still a matter of strength.

If he had the combat power of a one-step invincible domain ancestor, and with the help of the power of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, he should be able to burst out with a combat power that surpassed that of a one-step invincible domain ancestor, and when the time came, he could easily suppress these invincible domain ancestors who were making trouble.

At that time, who would dare to say another word?

"Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, what do you want to say?"

Bloodstained Domain Ancestral Dao.

The Five Thunder Domain Ancestors were very low-key and almost didn't make a move, so although the others knew that there was such an invincible Domain Ancestor in the Battle Gate, they didn't know him.

At this time, the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors said: "Everyone, the Dark Forbidden Domain respects strength, if you want to get the Holy Monument quota for free, then show your strength, if any of you are sure to defeat me, I can persuade the seven Invincible Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate not to stop you." But if you lose, then you can't intervene, what?"

"Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, this ......"

Gu Hai Ancestor and the others frowned, feeling that this was simply a free place for the other Holy Gates!

Ye Tian didn't speak, he felt that the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor dared to say this, he should have full confidence in himself, otherwise he would be embarrassed.

Moreover, the Five Thunder Domain Ancestor is not simple, it is a holy endowment, and it is also the three major holy endowments, one of which should be his own natal endowment.

Such an invincible domain ancestor is very powerful, and may have reached the combat power of an invincible domain ancestor in one step.

"Five Thunder Domain Ancestor, you are too arrogant, then I will come to comprehend your strength!"

The Bloodstained Domain Ancestor spoke.

"Enter my Void Territory and fight, lest you destroy the Void Saint Realm!"

The ancestral road of the ancient sea of the battle gate.

"Yes!"

"Yes!"

The Five Thunder Domain Ancestors and the Blood Stain Domain Ancestors both agreed.

Void Realms are special shards that can be transformed into a realm in which it is almost impossible to wreak havoc when fighting.

Of course, it can also be used to suppress others.

But the Ancient Sea Ancestor would definitely not dare to manipulate the Void Territory to suppress the Bloodstained Domain Ancestor, that would be tantamount to a foul.

At this moment, the Ancient Sea Ancestor's palm flipped over, and a small diamond-shaped fragment appeared.

"Go ahead!"

The Ancient Sea Ancestor waved his hand.

This fragment turned into a huge territory, enveloping this area, and the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors and the Blood Stain Domain Ancestors flew into this void territory one after another.
